title: Remove redundant edges in V3Trace. No functional change

features.name: nested genvar for loops with 2D array access
features.description: Code should include nested generate for loops using genvar with both loop variables indexing a 2D unpacked array in an assignment
features.snippet:
logic [7:0] arr [10][5];
for (genvar i = 0; i < 10; i++) for (genvar j = 0; j < 5; j++) assign arr[i][j] = i + j;

features.name: module instantiation inside generate for loop
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation placed inside a generate for loop with genvar

features.name: 2D unpacked array with mixed dimension access in assignment
features.description: Code should include assignment between 2D unpacked arrays where each dimension is accessed via separate genvar loop variables
